objective: Expand candidate coverage on cases where the first visible-holdout portfolio produced little externally verified evidence, using explicit but generally applicable structural reconstruction methods.

router.input: stage-one holdout predictions and their own removed public suffix terms only
router.selection_rule: Route cases with at most three stage-one candidates that exactly recover their own visible holdout.
router.ranking_rule: survivor count ascending, unique surviving answers descending, case_id ascending

fairness: Every selected case receives every specialist prompt. The subject sees only case_id, a shortened decimal prefix, and requested continuation length. It receives no family label, generator parameters, removed suffix terms, benchmark answers, prior predictions, or other agent output.
retry_rule: Never rerun a valid output. Retry only the identical logical job after schema or infrastructure failure and preserve every attempt ledger.
interpretation_rule: This is open development on B13/B14. Results may guide a future frozen architecture but cannot be reported as fresh or validated accuracy.
